queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with individuals lacking a formal checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical evaluation of how a negative checking account balance acts as a mitigating credit risk driver that reduces default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default linked to short-term employment duration of less than one year.
